title: [Slice 1] Foundation: Project Setup & Auth Middleware
description: Set up FastAPI project scaffolding with mocked Entra ID JWT authentication. Create project structure with requirements.txt, FastAPI application entry point, JWT token parser for fake Entra ID tokens, authentication middleware to extract user claims, and role extraction with context injection.
acceptance_criteria: FastAPI app initialized and running on port 8000
JWT token parser handles fake Entra ID token format
Auth middleware extracts and validates token claims
User context available in request via dependency injection
Unit tests for token parsing and user extraction
requirements.txt with all dependencies

title: [Slice 2] Foundation: Domain Models & Validation
description: Create Pydantic models for Expense and AuditLog with comprehensive input validation. Define all required fields with proper types and validators for amount, category, description, and expense date constraints.
acceptance_criteria: Pydantic models with all field validations
Custom validators for amount, category, description, expense_date
Unit tests for all validation rules (valid/invalid inputs)
Clear error messages for validation failures
Models in models/ directory

title: [Slice 3] Foundation: In-Memory Database Layer
description: Create an InMemoryDatabase class that manages all data persistence and enforces business rules. Implement CRUD operations for expenses and audit logs, state transition validation, and query methods.
acceptance_criteria: InMemoryDatabase class with full CRUD operations
State transition validation in repository methods
Query methods (by employee_id, by status, etc.)
Unit tests for CRUD, state validation, edge cases
No external dependencies (pure Python in-memory storage)
Database class in database/memory.py

title: [Slice 4] Error Handling & Configuration
description: Create centralized error handling infrastructure with configurable error codes and messages. Set up custom exception classes, global FastAPI exception handler, and consistent error response format.
acceptance_criteria: Custom exception classes defined
Error codes centralized and configurable
Global exception handler in FastAPI
Correct HTTP status codes returned
Unit tests for error responses across scenarios
Configuration in config.py

title: [Slice 5] Employee: Submit Expense Claim
description: Implement the expense submission workflow end-to-end with POST /expenses endpoint, input validation, database storage, and audit logging.
acceptance_criteria: POST /expenses endpoint accepts valid expense data
Input validation enforces all rules (amount, category, description, date)
Expense stored with SUBMITTED status
Audit log entry created for submission
Returns 201 with created expense details
Unit tests for valid/invalid submissions
Integration test: employee can submit, view returned UUID

title: [Slice 6] Manager: Approve/Reject Claim
description: Implement manager approval and rejection workflow with PATCH endpoints, state transitions, and audit logging.
acceptance_criteria: PATCH /approve endpoint transitions SUBMITTED → MANAGER_APPROVED
PATCH /reject endpoint transitions SUBMITTED → REJECTED with reason
Manager ID is tracked in expense
Audit log entries created with state changes
Self-approval prevention working
Cannot approve already-approved claims (state validation)
Unit tests for approval, rejection, edge cases
Integration test: submit → manager approves/rejects workflow

title: [Slice 7] Finance: Process Approved Claim
description: Implement finance processing workflow with PATCH /process endpoint, state transitions, and audit logging.
acceptance_criteria: PATCH /process endpoint transitions MANAGER_APPROVED → FINANCE_PROCESSED
Finance ID tracked in expense
Cannot process claims in other states (state validation)
Audit log entry created
Returns 200 with updated expense
Unit tests for processing, state validation
Integration test: submit → approve → process workflow

title: [Slice 8] Employee: Resubmit Rejected Claim
description: Implement resubmission workflow for rejected claims with PATCH endpoint, validation, and state reset.
acceptance_criteria: PATCH /resubmit endpoint accepts updated expense data
Input validation enforced (new amount, category, description, date)
REJECTED → SUBMITTED transition
Rejection reason cleared
Audit log shows full state change (previous_state, new_state)
Only owner can resubmit
Can only resubmit REJECTED claims
Unit tests for resubmission, validation, authorization
Integration test: submit → reject → resubmit → approve workflow

title: [Slice 9] Employee: View & List Claims
description: Implement listing and viewing of expense claims with role-based filtering and authorization checks.
acceptance_criteria: GET /expenses returns all claims for managers/finance
GET /expenses returns only own claims for employees
GET /expenses/{id} checks authorization (owner or manager/finance)
Returns 404 if not found or not authorized
Optional status/category filters work
Unit tests for role-based access control
Integration tests: employee sees own, manager sees all, finance sees all

title: [Slice 10] Employee: Delete Claim
description: Implement claim deletion with restrictions for state and ownership.
acceptance_criteria: DELETE /expenses/{id} deletes only if SUBMITTED or REJECTED
Cannot delete if in approval workflow (409 Conflict)
Only owner can delete (403 if not owner)
Audit log entry created for deletion
Returns 204 on success
Unit tests for deletion rules, authorization
Integration test: submit, reject, delete workflow

title: [Slice 11] Audit Logging: Full History Access
description: Implement audit log viewing endpoints for compliance tracking with filtering and access control.
acceptance_criteria: GET /audit-logs returns all audit entries
GET /expenses/{id}/audit-log returns history for single expense
Audit logs accurate across all operations (submit, approve, reject, resubmit, process, delete)
State diffs complete (previous_state, new_state)
Optional filters work (action, actor_id, date range)
Authorization checks in place
Unit tests for audit log retrieval
Integration test: perform all actions, verify audit trail is complete

title: [Slice 12] End-to-End Workflow Tests & Documentation
description: Comprehensive integration tests covering full workflows and complete API documentation with examples.
acceptance_criteria: Integration tests pass for full workflows
README complete with setup and examples
Swagger docs accessible and accurate
Sample curl commands work
Code coverage >90%
All edge cases tested (self-approval, invalid states, auth failures)
